Investigator: You start knowing that 1 of 2 players is a particular Minion.
Empath: Each night, you learn how many of your 2 alive neighbors are evil.
Clockmaker: You start knowing how many steps from the Demon to its nearest Minion.
Chambermaid: Each night, choose 2 alive players (not yourself): you learn how many woke tonight due to their ability.
Artist: Once per game, during the day, privately ask the Storyteller any yes/no question.
Sage: If the Demon kills you, you learn that it is 1 of 2 players.

Drunk: You do not know you are the drunk. You think you are a Townsfolk character, but you are not.
Klutz: When you learn that you died, publicly choose 1 alive player: if they are evil, your team loses.

Baron: There are extra Outsiders in play. [+2 Outsiders]
Scarlet Woman: If there are 5 or more players alive and the Demon dies, you become the Demon (Travellers don't count).

Imp: Each night*, choose a player. They die. If you kill yourself this way, a Minion becomes the Imp.

1.title: Minion Info
1.text: If there are 7 or more players, wake all Minions: Show the *THIS IS THE DEMON* token. Point to the Demon.

1.title: Demon Info
1.text: If there are 7 or more players, wake the Demon: Show the *THESE ARE YOUR MINIONS* token. Point to all Minions. Show the *THESE CHARACTERS ARE NOT IN PLAY* token. Show 3 not-in-play good character tokens.
messages: THESE CHARACTERS ARE NOT IN PLAY

1.title: Investigator (If in play)
1.text: Show the Minion character token. Point to both the *MINION* and *WRONG* players.

1.title: Chambermaid (If in play)
1.text: The Chambermaid chooses 2 players. Give a finger signal.

1.title: Dawn
1.text: Wait for a few seconds. End the Night Phase.

*.title: Scarlet Woman (If in play)
*.text: If the Scarlet Woman became the Demon today, show them the *YOU ARE* token, then the Demon token.

*.title: Imp
*.text: The Imp chooses a player. If the Imp chose themselves, replace 1 alive Minion token with a spare Imp token. Put the old Imp to sleep. Wake the new Imp. Show the *YOU ARE* token, then show the Imp token.

*.title: Sage (If in play)
*.text: If the Demon killed the Sage, wake the Sage and point to 2 players, 1 of which is the Demon.

*.title: Chambermaid (If in play)
*.text: The Chambermaid chooses 2 players. Give a finger signal.

*.title: Dawn
*.text: Wait for a few seconds. End the Night Phase.
